title: Construct the Binary Tree from Postorder and Inorder Traversal

content.problemStatement:
Given the Postorder and Inorder traversal of a Binary Tree, construct the Unique
    Binary Tree represented by them.
constraints: All elements in postorder and inorder are unique.
content.inputFormat: Two arrays of integers representing the postorder and inorder traversal of a binary tree.
content.outputFormat: The root of the constructed binary tree.
